## Runtime.RuntimeContextValidator.scaleRecipe() method

Scales a recipe by validating string IDs.

**Signature:**

```typescript
scaleRecipe(recipeId: string, targetWeight: Grams, options?: IRecipeScaleOptions): Result<RuntimeScaledVersion>;
```
